description: Remove redundant full-file-body fields (state.metadata.files[].before / .after) from apply_patch tool return. Confirmed not in LLM prompt (UI-only). Aligns apply_patch with the 2026-04-23 write/edit migration (mobile-session-restructure). UI consumers migrate to hunk-format diff rendering. Lazy migration: old sessions keep their bloat untouched.

activities.title: Narrow tool metadata type
activities.description: Remove `before` and `after` from ApplyPatchFileMetadata at apply_patch.ts:27-37 (type) and apply_patch.ts:406-415 (return value). Per-file metadata becomes {filePath, relativePath, type, diff, additions, deletions, movePath?}. No other apply_patch behavior changes.

activities.title: Edit type definition
activities.description: Drop `before: string` and `after: string` properties from ApplyPatchFileMetadata interface.

activities.title: Edit return value construction
activities.description: In the loop that builds per-file metadata, stop assigning before/after. Keep diff computation (it consumes oldContent/newContent locally and discards them after producing the diff string).

activities.title: Migrate UI consumers to hunk-format diff
activities.description: Three sites in message-part.tsx feed before/after into useDiffComponent(). Switch to feeding the existing hunk-format diff (file.diff) into the same component, mirroring edit/write rendering. Plus remove the two dead-code lines from prior edit-tool migration.

activities.title: Multi-file viewer (L1769-1770)
activities.description: Apply_patch result with multiple files. Switch the loop body from passing {before, after} contents to passing diff hunks.

activities.title: Single-file detail (L1808-1809)
activities.description: Apply_patch expanded view for single file. Same migration as A21.

activities.title: Remove dead edit-tool code (L1625, L1629)
activities.description: Edit-tool migration left UI code reading props.metadata?.filediff?.before/.after, but edit.ts never populates them. Drop the references; fallback to existing oldString/newString path is already in place.

activities.title: Backwards-compatible field access
activities.description: Where the hunk diff is available in both old and new payloads, ensure UI reads `file.diff` (always populated) and tolerates missing before/after. New sessions render via hunk; old sessions still work.

arrows.label: diff visible regardless of metadata shape

activities.title: Update test fixture
activities.description: Dreaming pruning test at dreaming.test.ts:309 currently asserts that oversized before/after are replaced with [dream-pruned: ...] stubs. After the change, new payloads no longer carry before/after at all; the assertion shape must reflect that pruner now has nothing to prune for new sessions (but still works on legacy fixtures).

activities.title: Verification
activities.description: Run apply_patch in a live session, confirm new payload size (~14 KB instead of ~800 KB), view diff in UI, replay an older session containing legacy before/after to confirm graceful rendering.

arrows.label: DD-2 hunk renderer, DD-3 remove dead code
session DB ~58x smaller for apply_patch-heavy sessions
DD-4 no vacuum, DD-5 snapshot remains canonical
